title: Jagannath Temple, Gunupur
tagline: Jagannath Temple, Gunupur — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Jagannath Temple,(Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିର) Gunupur, stands at the eastern end of the town Gunupur in the Old Gunupur area.
overview.description: Jagannath Temple,(Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିର) Gunupur, stands at the eastern end of the town Gunupur in the Old Gunupur area. The old temple was built by the Jeypore Maharaja Vikramadeb more than 100 years back.

topPlaces.name: Gunupur
topPlaces.description: Gunupur is a Municipality and one of the sub-divisional headquarters of Rayagada district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is the second biggest town in Rayagada district.

topPlaces.name: St. Paul's Church, Gunupur
topPlaces.description: St. Paul's is a Catholic church at Gunupur, Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Sirijholi
topPlaces.description: Sirijholi, also spelled Sirijholly), is a medium-sized village located in the Indian state of Odisha in the Rayagada district. It is the panchayat headquarter of the Sirijholi Grama Panchayat and is administrated by a Sarapancha.

topPlaces.name: Battili
topPlaces.description: Bathili (also spelled Battili) is a village in Bhamini Mandal of Parvathipuram Manyam district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is situated on the interstate border with Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Gunupur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Gunupur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jagannath Temple, Gunupur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (164 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (160 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jagannath Temple, Gunupur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jagannath Temple, Gunupur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jagannath Temple, Gunupur?
faq.a: Stays in Jagannath Temple, Gunupur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jagannath Temple, Gunupur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gunupur, St. Paul's Church, Gunupur, Sirijholi, Kujendri, Battili.
